overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player emerges from a dark corridor into covered walkways, passes through an open intersection with fireworks overhead, and enters a colorful indoor plaza. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring wet reflective streets and vibrant neon signage.

events.description: emerging from dark corridor into lit covered walkway
passing pedestrians walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing light-colored clothing

entered.detail: overhead concrete roof with linear fluorescent lighting
building facade with bright green neon signage and glass doors
asphalt road with reflective wet surface showing light reflections
vertical red Japanese characters painted on dark wall

segments.scene_description: The clip begins in a dark corridor looking out onto a neon-lit street. The camera moves forward into a covered walkway with a concrete roof overhead. Green neon storefronts line the left side while a wet reflective street runs along the right. Pedestrians walk along the path as the camera advances steadily.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit walkway alongside vehicle traffic

events.description: white sedan with headlights on passes by on the right
continuing straight along the covered path approaching intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk with traffic passing on the right side

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: large structure with red illuminated windows and geometric facade
large digital screen displaying animated advertisements
continuous linear cyan neon lights along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the covered walkway with vehicles passing on the adjacent street. A transit station with distinctive red lighting becomes visible ahead. Digital billboards and neon strip lights illuminate the path as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with fireworks display overhead

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open intersection with visible sky
fireworks begin exploding overhead illuminating the night sky
turning right at the intersection toward the arched structures

agents.ego_description: crossing the open intersection while looking up at the fireworks display

notable_agents.action: walking ahead toward the crosswalk signal

entered.detail: purple and white fireworks exploding in the night sky above buildings
futuristic building entrance with curved red and cyan neon light strips
large illuminated sign with 'KABUKICHI' text on building facade
illuminated yellow walk sign mounted on black pole

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wide intersection with full sky visibility. Fireworks explode overhead in purple and white bursts. The camera crosses the street toward a distinctive arched structure with neon lights. The Kabukichi sign is visible on a building ahead as pedestrians cross the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional street leading to indoor plaza entrance

events.description: moving from open street into covered building entrance area
passing red sports car parked on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the street and approaching the entrance to an indoor plaza

entered.detail: parked futuristic red vehicle with reflective surface and sleek design
colorful building entrance with teal walls and yellow structural frames
building front with bright pink neon vertical lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a street lined with parked vehicles, passing a distinctive red sports car. The environment transitions from open sky back to a covered area as the camera approaches a colorful plaza entrance with teal and yellow walls. Neon pink lights illuminate the building facades along the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic indoor plaza with teal architecture and neon accents

events.description: entering the fully enclosed colorful plaza with artificial lighting
turning left to explore the interior of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the deserted indoor plaza, examining the colorful architecture and digital displays

entered.detail: vibrant teal colored walls with weathered texture and yellow door frames
linear pink neon lights running along the ceiling panels
large screen displaying animated character with yellow text
raised planters with green foliage and trees inside the plaza
futuristic bench with yellow frame and pink underlighting

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a fully enclosed indoor plaza with distinctive teal walls and yellow structural elements. Pink neon lights illuminate the ceiling while digital screens display advertisements on the far wall. The space contains indoor plant beds and modern seating, with debris scattered on the tiled floor. The camera turns to explore the interior of this deserted futuristic space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed corridor into a vibrant, neon-drenched urban intersection before concluding inside a colorful futuristic plaza. It begins by emerging from the shadows into a covered walkway, where green neon storefronts and wet, reflective streets guide the path past steady streams of pedestrians. As the camera advances, the scene opens from the concrete shelter into a wide intersection under a night sky illuminated by purple and white fireworks, passing the Kabukichi sign and an arched neon structure. The environment then shifts back toward covered facades lined with parked vehicles and pink neon lights, moving past a red sports car toward a teal and yellow entrance. Finally, the camera enters a fully enclosed indoor plaza, transitioning into a deserted space of teal walls, yellow structural elements, and digital advertisements reflected on a debris-strewn tiled floor.
